claim_boundary: M24 blocks external angular-momentum validation because no direct local external j_star, j_gas, j_bar, lambda_R, or halo-spin measurements were found. This is not evidence against M20, but it prevents manuscript promotion on external-J grounds.
leakage_warning: The current J_lambda proxy includes observed Vflat, so M25 must test velocity-domain leakage/control variants before promotion.
